ai_summary: This document confirms that Hindcon Chemicals Limited, through its Registrar & Transfer Agent, has fully complied with SEBI Regulation 74(5) for the quarter ended June 30, 2026. All physical share certificates submitted for dematerialization during this period were duly cancelled, mutilated, and the electronic records updated, ensuring the integrity of the company's share registry and adherence to regulatory standards. This is a routine compliance filing with no apparent red flags, indicating proper governance of shareholder records.
